info.title: Integration Tests - Simplified Employee Shift Scheduling model

post.summary: Posts a dataset and optionally requests its solving. Unique identifier is returned that can be used for further operations on the dataset.

parameters.description: Optional name to be given to the dataset, if not provided a name will be generated.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Operation to execute on the POST request.
parameters.name: operation

400.description: In case request given does not meet expectations

202.description: Successfully accepted request to post a dataset

parentId.description: The id of the parent data set this was created from

originId.description: The id of the origin (root) data set this initially originates from

submitDateTime.description: The moment the run is submitted

startDateTime.description: The moment the run begins initializing

activeDateTime.description: The moment the solving phase begins

completeDateTime.description: The moment the solving phase concludes

shutdownDateTime.description: The moment the post-processing phase finishes

failureMessage.description: The message describing the reason of failure, in case of solverStatus=SOLVING_FAILED.

get.summary: List all schedules that are registered in the service (that are to be solved, in progress or solved), only returning it's status, score and id

404.description: In case request given schedule does not exist

get.summary: Get validation issue types supported by the model

200.description: Validation issue types supported by the model

get.summary: Get validation issue type by the code

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the validation issue type
parameters.name: code

404.description: In case the issue type of the given code does not exist

200.description: Validation issue type of the given code

delete.summary: Terminate and return schedule with given identifier

404.description: In case request given schedule does not exist

post.summary: Request solving a dataset under the given unique identifier.

202.description: Successfully accepted request to solve scheduling problem

parentId.description: The id of the parent data set this was created from

originId.description: The id of the origin (root) data set this initially originates from

submitDateTime.description: The moment the run is submitted

startDateTime.description: The moment the run begins initializing

activeDateTime.description: The moment the solving phase begins

completeDateTime.description: The moment the solving phase concludes

shutdownDateTime.description: The moment the post-processing phase finishes

failureMessage.description: The message describing the reason of failure, in case of solverStatus=SOLVING_FAILED.

get.summary: Get schedule (might be incomplete as long as the solver is still running) with given identifier

404.description: In case request given schedule does not exist

get.summary: Get the configuration used for the schedule

404.description: In case request given schedule does not exist

200.description: Returns the configuration used for a schedule with the given identifier

get.summary: Subscribes to events of given dataset (of type metadata) as long as it has not yet reached final state (completed, failed, incomplete or invalid)

404.description: In case request given dataset does not exist

410.description: In case given dataset is already in final state

post.summary: Preview: Request a problem to be solved, based on a previous dataset that is patched with given operations. A unique identifier is returned that can be used to get the dataset
post.description: Request a problem to be solved, based on a previous dataset that is patched with given operations. This operation is in preview and might be a subject to change. This operation is not be available for everyone (feature-flagged).

parameters.description: Optional name to be given to the dataset, if not provided a name will be generated.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Operation to execute on the POST request.
parameters.name: operation

parameters.description: Data to use as a source for the operation.
parameters.name: select

code.description: Issue code referring to an issue type.

shiftCount.title: Shifts
shiftCount.description: The number of shifts submitted in the input dataset.

employeeCount.title: Emplyees
employeeCount.description: The number of employees submitted in the input dataset.

assignedShifts.title: Assigned Shifts
assignedShifts.description: The number of shifts assigned to employees.

type.description: The type of the issue type detail.
The type of the issue type detail.

code.description: Unique case-sensitive code of the issue type.

LegacyValidationResult.description: The result of the validation of the model input

summary.description: The summary of the validation. The model input passes the validation if the summary does not contain errors.

errors.description: The list of errors that occurred during the validation. If the list is empty, the model input is considered valid.

warnings.description: The list of warnings that occurred during the validation.

overrides.description: The configuration of individual (soft) constraints weights and additional global model configuration attributes.
The configuration of individual (soft) constraints weights and additional global model configuration attributes.
The configuration of individual (soft) constraints weights and additional global model configuration attributes.

model.description: The model configuration. Impacts the quality of solution.
The model configuration. Impacts the quality of solution.

path.description: Path within the dataset structure to be modified. Can use field expression with format [fieldName=value] or index to point to selected objects

value.description: Value (object, array or simple value) to be used for add or replace operations. It should not be given for remove operation

config.description: Optional configuration to be applied when solving the patched dataset.

patch.description: List of patches to be applied to the original dataset.

config.description: The configuration of the model request. If not provided, defaults of the model are used.

modelOutput.description: The solution to the requested model input.

inputMetrics.description: Key metrics aggregated from the model input.

kpis.description: Key metrics aggregated from the model output.

run.description: The model run metadata. Deprecated in favor of "metadata"

name.description: Optional name to be given to the dataset. If not provided, the name will be generated.

maxThreadCount.description: Optional maximum number of threads to be used for solving.

tags.description: Optional tags to be assigned to the dataset.

model.description: Model configuration for the score analysis.

spentLimit.description: Maximum duration (ISO 8601 duration format) to keep the solver running (e.g. PT1H).

unimprovedSpentLimit.description: Maximum unimproved score duration (ISO 8601 duration format). If the score has not improved during this period (e.g. PT5M), terminate the solver. If no value is provided, the default diminished returns termination will apply. If set, stepCountLimit must be empty. Warning: using this option will disable the default diminished returns termination which is recommended for most use cases.

stepCountLimit.description: Maximum solver step count. The solver will stop solving after a pre-determined amount of steps. Use when you require results independently of the hardware resources performance. Use this termination if you want to benchmark your models, not recommended for production use. If set, unimprovedSpentLimit must be empty. Warning: using this option will disable the default diminished returns termination which is recommended for most use cases.

issueTypes.description: List of all supported validation issue types together with their metadata.

status.description: Determines if the validated dataset is accepted for further processing
